summary: Ultrametric clustering and p-adic neural operator benchmarking on The Well dataset (15TB, 23 datasets, 16+ physical domains). All executable phases complete. Remaining phases BLOCKED.

executed_phases.discovery: completed — README.md (17,980 bytes, 6-section strategic fit analysis)
executed_phases.kg_seeding: completed — 3 nodes + 3 edges, verified via /neighbors API

real_data_clustering.blocker: 50GB+ download of The Well data exceeds thin-client laptop capabilities
real_data_clustering.unblock_action: pip install the_well && the-well-download --dataset shear_flow --split train on a compute-capable machine
real_data_clustering.estimated_effort: 1-2 hours on machine with >=100GB free disk

neural_operator_training.blocker: GPU operations require CUDA-capable hardware; local budget laptop cannot train neural operators
neural_operator_training.unblock_action: pip install torch scipy on GPU-capable machine OR use Cloudflare Workers AI (if model size permits)
neural_operator_training.estimated_effort: 4-8 hours GPU time for 5-seed benchmark on 3 datasets

publication_finalization.blocker: Dependent on real_data_clustering and neural_operator_training results
publication_finalization.unblock_action: Populate [PLACEHOLDER] sections in PAPER_SKELETON.md with experimental results, then run publication-publisher skill

next_session_handoff.action: Download The Well data and run clustering on real physics data

closeout.disposition: BLOCKED — compute/storage limitations on local laptop
